evidence.claim: Expertise in Ranking Systems, Text Encoders, Indexing Algorithms, Forecasting, Vector Representations, Qdrant, OpenSearch, TensorFlow, Content Matching, Information Retrieval Systems, Haystack, Machine Learning, Search & Discovery, Search Backend, scikit-learn, and ASR.
evidence.source_text: Skills: Ranking Systems (expert, 77mo, 3 endorsements); Text Encoders (expert, 92mo, 25 endorsements); Indexing Algorithms (expert, 37mo, 34 endorsements); Forecasting (advanced, 44mo, 29 endorsements); Vector Representations (expert, 46mo, 46 endorsements); Qdrant (advanced, 20mo, 57 endorsements); OpenSearch (expert, 88mo, 41 endorsements); Open-source ML libraries (advanced, 37mo, 13 endorsements); TensorFlow (expert, 54mo, 12 endorsements); Content Matching (advanced, 43mo, 54 endorsements); Information Retrieval Systems (expert, 76mo, 7 endorsements); Haystack (expert, 58mo, 30 endorsements); Statistical Modeling (intermediate, 8mo, 11 endorsements); Machine Learning (advanced, 52mo, 14 endorsements); Search & Discovery (expert, 66mo, 34 endorsements); GANs (advanced, 45mo, 6 endorsements); Search Backend (advanced, 56mo, 42 endorsements); scikit-learn (expert, 84mo, 11 endorsements); ASR (advanced, 38mo, 22 endorsements)

evidence.claim: Led team growth from 1 to 6 engineers during a matching layer overhaul project.
evidence.source_text: The team grew from just me to 6 engineers over the course of that work.

evidence.claim: Overhauled matching layer from hand-tuned heuristics to explicit modeling and evaluation.
evidence.source_text: Recent project was a complete overhaul of the matching layer; took it from a hand-tuned heuristic system to one with explicit modeling and evaluation.

evidence.claim: Prefers shipping v1 in 6 weeks over perfect v2 in 6 months.
evidence.source_text: Strong preference for shipping real systems over research-only work; I'd rather have a working v1 in 6 weeks than a perfect v2 in 6 months.

evidence.claim: Learned from past mistakes including over-engineering and optimizing metrics that do not impact online performance.
evidence.source_text: I've made the standard mistakes — over-engineering early, optimizing offline metrics that didn't move online numbers, building beautiful infrastructure for features that users didn't actually want — so I notice them faster now.

evidence.claim: Holds a Ph.D in Information Technology.
evidence.source_text: Education: Ph.D in Information Technology at Jadavpur University (2010)
